raw_title: Future Imaginaries of Visual Open Source Investigative Journalism
title_en: Future Imaginaries of Visual Open Source Investigative Journalism
title_zh: 视觉开源调查新闻的未来想象
plain_summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨了视觉开源调查新闻的未来可能性。它研究记者如何利用开源工具和视觉材料（如照片和视频）进行调查报道，以及公民参与如何影响这一领域的发展。文章还考虑了技术和工作方式的变化将如何塑造未来的新闻实践。
plain_summary_en: This article explores the future possibilities of visual open source investigative journalism. It examines how journalists use open source tools and visual materials (like photos and videos) for investigative reporting, and how citizen participation influences this field. The article also considers how technological and work practice changes might shape future journalism.
research_direction_zh: 研究数字时代调查新闻的创新方法，特别是视觉和开源技术的应用，以及新闻业未来发展的趋势和挑战。
research_direction_en: Investigating innovative methods in investigative journalism in the digital age, particularly the application of visual and open source technologies, and trends and challenges in the future development of journalism.
